features.name: User Authentication
features.description: JWT-based authentication with user registration and login

features.name: Policy Management - Create
features.description: Create new insurance policies with all required details

features.name: Policy Management - Retrieve
features.description: Get policy details by ID with masked SSN/TIN

features.name: Policy Management - Update
features.description: Update existing policy information with audit trail

features.name: Policy Search
features.description: Search policies by multiple criteria with pagination

features.name: SSN/TIN Security
features.description: Encrypt SSN/TIN at rest and mask in responses (show only last 4 digits)

features.name: Claims Management - Create
features.description: Create new claims linked to policies

features.name: Claims Management - Retrieve
features.description: Get claim details by ID

features.name: Claims Management - Update
features.description: Update claim information with audit trail

features.name: Claim History
features.description: Display claim history for a policy sorted by loss date

features.name: Claim Search
features.description: Search claims with filters and pagination

features.name: Claim-Level Policy Data
features.description: Add/edit policy information at claim level for unverified policies

features.name: Subrogation Referral
features.description: Refer claims to subrogation with tracking

features.name: Scheduled Payments Management
features.description: Manage scheduled payments for claims

features.name: Payment Management - Create
features.description: Create payments with multiple payment methods

features.name: Payment Management - Retrieve
features.description: Get payment details by ID

features.name: Payment Management - Update
features.description: Update payment information with audit trail

features.name: Payment Lifecycle - Void
features.description: Void payments with reason tracking

features.name: Payment Lifecycle - Reverse
features.description: Reverse payments with reason tracking

features.name: Payment Lifecycle - Reissue
features.description: Reissue void or reversed payments

features.name: Payment Details Management
features.description: Add/remove payees and payment portions

features.name: Payment Search
features.description: Search payments with filters and pagination

features.name: Tax Reporting
features.description: Support tax reportable payments with tax ID capture

features.name: Reserve Lines Allocation
features.description: Allocate payments across multiple reserve lines

features.name: Vendor Management
features.description: Onboard and manage vendors for payments

features.name: Audit Trail
features.description: Log all actions with user ID and timestamp

features.name: Data Encryption
features.description: Encrypt sensitive data (SSN/TIN, banking info) at rest

features.name: JWT Authentication
features.description: JWT-based authentication with 60-minute expiration

features.name: Password Hashing
features.description: Bcrypt password hashing for user credentials

features.name: CORS Middleware
features.description: Configure CORS for allowed origins

features.name: Correlation ID Middleware
features.description: Track requests with correlation IDs

features.name: Request Logging Middleware
features.description: Log all requests with method, path, status, and duration

features.name: Exception Handling
features.description: Centralized exception handling with typed exceptions

features.name: Health Check Endpoints
features.description: Liveness and readiness probes

features.name: Configuration Management
features.description: Environment-based configuration with Pydantic Settings

features.name: Database Setup
features.description: Async SQLAlchemy with SQLite (dev) and PostgreSQL support
